# Openupgrade Scripts

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module is a containers of migration script to migrate from 16.0 to
17.0 version.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Installation

This module does not need to be installed on a database. It simply needs
to be available via your `addons-path`.

## Configuration

- call your odoo instance with the option
  `--upgrade-path=/PATH_TO_openupgrade_scripts_MODULE/scripts/`

or

- add the key to your configuration file:

```shell
[options]
upgrade_path = /PATH_TO_openupgrade_scripts_MODULE/scripts/
```

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/OpenUpgrade/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/OpenUpgrade/issues/new?body=module:%20openupgrade_scripts%0Aversion:%2017.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

## Credits

modules.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.apriori
documentation:
Encode any known changes to the database here
to help the matching process

modules.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.analytic.17.0.1.1.post-migration
documentation: Copyright 2024 Viindoo Technology Joint Stock Company (Viindoo)

functions.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.analytic.17.0.1.1.post-migration._adjust_analytic_plan_sequence
documentation:
As now the order is by sequence, and on v16 it was the id, we have to assign the
sequence numbers to preserve the previous order by default, for not having any
undesired modification. Once in v17, you can redefine the order to your
choice if desired.

functions.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.analytic.17.0.1.1.post-migration._analytic_line_create_x_plan_column
documentation:
This method set system parameter for project analytic plan
and create dynamic field on analytic items using
'_sync_plan_column' method

functions.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.analytic.17.0.1.1.post-migration._analytic_plan_update_applicability_into_property
documentation:
Create ir.property for default_applicability of account.analytic.plan
in all companies as the company_id field was shifted from account.analytic.plan
to account.analytic.applicability

functions.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.resource.17.0.1.1.pre-migration._reset_calendar_attendance_sequence
documentation:
As the field `sequence` exists previously in 16, and you were able to change it
on screen, there's a chance that your DB have some sequence values that alters the
previous order when migrating.

Thus, the safest thing is to reset the sequence value to its default value for
preserving always the previous order.

documentation: Copyright 2024 Viindoo Technology Joint Stock Company (Viindoo)

functions.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.base.17.0.1.3.end-migration.migrate
documentation: Call disable_invalid_filters in every edition of openupgrade

modules.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.base.17.0.1.3.pre-migration
documentation: Copyright 2024 Viindoo Technology Joint Stock Company (Viindoo)

functions.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.base.17.0.1.3.pre-migration.migrate
documentation:
Don't request an env for the base pre-migration as flushing the env in
odoo/modules/registry.py will break on the 'base' module not yet having
been instantiated.

modules.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.product.17.0.1.2.post-migration
documentation: Copyright 2024 Viindoo Technology Joint Stock Company (Viindoo)

functions.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.product.17.0.1.2.post-migration._preserve_pricelist_order
documentation:
As the order determines which priority to apply the pricelists, we should assure
that with the new order criteria, everything remains the same, so let's rewrite the
sequence for not depending on the id.

functions.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.product.17.0.1.2.post-migration._remove_if_applicable_base_pricelist
documentation:
As this pricelist may be used by users for adding extra rules, we can't just
remove it. Let's check the content, and if the pricelist hasn't been touched, then
try to remove it. If any modification, we just remove the XML-ID.

modules.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.product.17.0.1.2.pre-migration
documentation: Copyright 2024 Viindoo Technology Joint Stock Company (Viindoo)

functions.name: odoo.addons.openupgrade_scripts.scripts.product.17.0.1.2.pre-migration._clean_incorrect_packaging_records
documentation:
If there's any record of this kind, it's invalid and maybe a leftover of a
non-cascade removal operation. Let's clean the table. There's a chance that this
package was used elsewhere, so this will crash, but in that case, it seems legit to
do it, for checking what's going on.
